title: VD Satheesan takes oath as Kerala CM today. Full list of 20 ministers in UDF government
description: The swearing-in will be held at the Central Stadium in Thiruvananthapuram, the capital of Kerala, at 10 am today. VD Satheesan met Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar at Lok Bhavan on Sunday and submitted the list of ministers to be sworn in along with him.
